info.title: MachinePlay API
info.description:
Backend for **[MachinePlay](https://machineplay.org)**.

Users upload UCI chess engines as Docker images; runners pull them from a
private registry and play games via
[fastchess](https://github.com/Disservin/fastchess), streamed live to the
browser over Server-Sent Events.

get.description: The GitHub profile waiting on a handle, for the /register page.

post.description: Complete a pending GitHub signup with the chosen handle.

get.description: The logged-in user's API tokens (prefix + timestamps, never plaintext).

post.description: Mint a CLI API token for the logged-in user (shown once).

get.description:
Docker Registry v2 token endpoint (the registry's `auth.token.realm`).

Authenticates the ``mp_`` token sent as the HTTP Basic password (written by
``machineplay login``) and mints a signed JWT granting the requested scopes.

post.description: Record an engine version after the CLI pushed its image to the registry.

get.description: Public profile: the user, their engines, and those engines' games.
Engine detail addressed GitHub-style: owner handle + engine name.
All registered runners, durable metadata joined with live online status.
One runner's durable metadata joined with its live online status.

post.description: Stop a running game: aborts it and kills its engine containers.
Create a tournament and start dispatching its pairings onto the runner.

get.description: Tournament detail: participants, computed standings, and its games.

post.description: Stop a running tournament (creator or admin only).

HardwareInfo.title: HardwareInfo
HardwareInfo.description:
Static hardware description a runner reports once, in its Introduction.

Persisted on the backend's Runner doc so it shows even while offline. GPU
fields can be added here later as a purely additive change.

PendingSignupOut.title: PendingSignupOut
PendingSignupOut.description: The in-progress GitHub signup waiting for the user to pick a handle.

RunnerLiveEvent.title: RunnerLiveEvent
RunnerLiveEvent.description:
One runner's live status, pushed over the /stream/runners SSE feed on
connect, on each telemetry sample, and on disconnect.

StandingRow.title: StandingRow
StandingRow.description: One participant's tally over the tournament's finished (ENDED) games.

Telemetry.title: Telemetry
Telemetry.description:
Live resource utilization a runner reports periodically while connected.

Kept in memory on the backend (meaningful only while online) and fanned out
over the runner SSE stream; not persisted.

TournamentOut.title: TournamentOut
TournamentOut.description: List-view summary: metadata plus game-progress counts.

UserProfileOut.title: UserProfileOut
UserProfileOut.description: Public profile: the user plus their engines and those engines' games.

tags.name: Auth & account
tags.description: GitHub OAuth login, the logged-in account, session and CLI tokens, and the Docker registry token endpoint.

tags.name: Engines & profiles
tags.description: Public user profiles and the engines they've uploaded.

tags.name: Games & runners
tags.description: Start games, browse results, and see the connected runners that play them.

tags.name: Tournaments
tags.description: Round-robin and gauntlet tournaments: create one on a runner and watch its pairings play out with live standings.

tags.name: Live streaming
tags.description: Server-Sent Events for live game updates and the runner WebSocket.
